title: Kurumbera Fort
tagline: Kurumbera Fort — heritage city of West Bengal

overview.short: Kurumbera Fort is a medieval fort situated in Gaganeshwar village, southeast of Keshiari, at about four kilometres from that town.
overview.description: Kurumbera Fort is a medieval fort situated in Gaganeshwar village, southeast of Keshiari, at about four kilometres from that town. The fort has small quarters and temples. It is a protected monument under the Archaeological Survey of India.

topPlaces.name: Keshiary
topPlaces.description: Keshiary (also spelled as Keshiari) is a village in the Keshiari CD block in the Kharagpur subdivision of the Paschim Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Keshiari
topPlaces.description: Keshiari (also spelled Keshiary) is a community development block that forms an administrative division in the Kharagpur subdivision of Paschim Medinipur district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Deuli, India
topPlaces.description: Deuli is a census town in the Narayangarh CD block in the Kharagpur subdivision of the Paschim Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Belda
topPlaces.description: Belda (Bengali pronunciation: [belda]), is a town in the Narayangarh CD block in the Kharagpur subdivision of the Paschim Medinipur district in West Bengal, India.

items.note: Keshiary (also spelled as Keshiari) is a village in the Keshiari CD block in the Kharagpur subdivision of the Paschim Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kurumbera Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kurumbera Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kurumbera Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (138 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (125 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kurumbera Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kurumbera Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kurumbera Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Kurumbera Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kurumbera Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Keshiary, Keshiari, Deuli, India, Belda.
